name: python3-stack-data
title: python3-stack-data
description:
Better tracebacks for Python
This is a library which extracts data from stack frames and tracebacks,
particularly to display more useful tracebacks than Python's default.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-stack-data because Better tracebacks for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-stack-data as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-stack-data with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-stack-data --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
